name: zoon
description: Agent-native collaborative documents for Codex. Open Zoon docs in Codex Browser, then read and write over plain HTTP with visible AI authorship.

interface.shortDescription: Open and write collaborative Zoon docs from Codex
interface.longDescription: Zoon lets Codex open online documents in Codex Browser for visible collaboration, while reading and writing document content over plain HTTP. Use it when a user shares a Zoon URL, asks to push a plan/spec/article into Zoon, or wants long structured output in an editable collaborative document instead of chat.
defaultPrompt: Open this Zoon document in Codex Browser
Write this plan into a new Zoon doc
Push long structured output to Zoon
